zh.Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Co: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯普萊姆斯
zh.Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Brit: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Wallen於1590年出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親William Wallis Wallace21歲，母親Jane Drake18歲。他和Mrs. Ralph Wallis至少有1個兒子。他去世於1633年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯普萊姆斯享年43歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wallen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish (mainly Wallén): topographic or ornamental name composed of a variant of the element vall ‘grassy bank, pasture’ (see Wall ) or the root of Latin vallis ‘valley’ (representing Swedish dal) + the adjectival suffix -én/-en, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’. Compare Wallin and Walen .

variants.name: Wall
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a stone-built wall, e.g. one used to fortify a town or to keep back the encroachment of the sea (Middle English wall ‘wall’, Old English wall, weall, from Latin vallum ‘rampart, palisade’), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Wall (Staffordshire).
English (West Midlands): topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, northern Middle English wall(e) (Old English (Mercian) wæll(a); compare Well ).
Irish (of Norman origin): Anglicized form of de Valle (Gaelicized form de Bhál), the name of a Norman family established in Munster and Connacht.

variants.name: Walen
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name containing the element walha-.
Norwegian: variant of Valen . The surname Walen is rare in Norway.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Wallen was born in 1590, in London, England, his father, William Wallis Wallace, was 21 and his mother, Jane Drake, was 18. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Ralph Wallis. He died in 1633, in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 43, and was buried in Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Wallenが1590年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父William Wallis Wallaceは21歳，母Jane Drakeは18歳であった。彼はMrs. Ralph Wallisとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1633年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスプリモウスで43歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Wallen(이)가 1590년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wallis Wallace(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Drake(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Mrs. Ralph Wallis(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1633년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 플림우스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Wallen родился в 1590 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени William Wallis Wallace было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Drake, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Ralph Wallis. Он умер в 1633 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
